content: Mission RFC enforcement via CHECK constraints: MissionState ('active'|'frozen'|'completed'|'failed'|'cancelled') and MissionPhase ('understand'|'align'|'decide'|'plan'|'execute'|'done') are enforced at table creation time in store.ts CREATE TABLE, ensuring database integrity and preventing invalid state transitions at the SQL level.

description: Mission CLI silent failure: missionStop bundle export errors don't set exit code
resolution: Set process.exitCode=1 on bundle export failure in missionStop() at line 490

description: Orphaned mission record if analyst startup fails
resolution: Add try/finally cleanup to remove mission if startMissionAnalyst fails in missionStart()
